title: Elephants' Epic Journey Ends

title: Jesse Owens Races to Olympic Glory
story: Zoom! Jesse Owens sprinted across the finish line, leading the American 4 x 100 m relay team to victory. On August 9, 1936, at the Berlin Olympics, Owens and his teammates blazed through the race in a lightning-fast 39.8 seconds. title: Lightning Bolt Strikes Twice!
story: Zoom! Usain Bolt raced into history on August 9, 2012. The Jamaican sprinter blazed across the finish line in the 200-meter dash at the London Olympics. story: Ground broke on a bell tower in Pisa, Italy that would become world-famous - but not for the reasons its builders intended! Construction began in 1173, but it took nearly 200 years to finish. title: Luna 24: Earth's Last Moon Mission
story: Rockets roared as the Soviet Union launched Luna 24 into space. This robotic explorer blasted off on August 9, 1976, becoming the final spacecraft from Earth to visit the Moon. title: A Humble Saint's Extraordinary Journey
story: Alfred Bessette, later known as Brother André, was born in Quebec, Canada in 1845. This humble man became a beloved figure, known for his deep faith and healing touch. He founded St. Joseph's Oratory in Montreal, which grew from a tiny chapel into a grand basilica. Brother André's kindness and reported miracles led to his canonization as a saint in 2010.

title: Hockey Hero Rod Brind'Amour Skates into Life
story: Rod Brind'Amour glided onto the ice of life in Ottawa, Ontario on August 9, 1970. This Canadian hockey star would become a legendary center, leading the Carolina Hurricanes to Stanley Cup victory as team captain in 2006. Brind'Amour's skills earned him spots in the NHL All-Star game and two Selke Trophies as the league's best defensive forward.
activity_question: What team did Rod Brind'Amour lead to a Stanley Cup victory?
bonus_fact: After retiring as a player, Brind'Amour became a coach and won the Jack Adams Award in 2021.

title: A-Mei: Taiwan's Pop Queen Takes the Stage
story: Kulilay Amit, better known as A-Mei, burst onto the music scene with a powerful voice. Born in 1972 in Beinan, Taiwan, she grew up to become the 'Queen of Mando-Pop'. Her unique blend of traditional Puyuma sounds and modern pop has captivated fans since her August 9 debut. A-Mei's journey from a small town to stardom inspires young singers across Asia.
activity_question: What is A-Mei's birth name?
bonus_fact: A-Mei belongs to the Puyuma, one of Taiwan's indigenous peoples known for their rich musical traditions.

title: Bulgaria Rises: A New Kingdom Emerges
story: Swords clashed and armies battled near the Danube Delta. When the dust settled in 681, a new power had risen. The Byzantine Emperor Constantine IV's forces were defeated, paving the way for the birth of Bulgaria. This new Khanate, a type of kingdom, was established on the south bank of the mighty Danube River. August 9 marked the beginning of a nation that would shape history for centuries to come.
activity_question: Where was the new Bulgarian Khanate established?
activity_choices: On the south bank of the Danube River
activity_answer: On the south bank of the Danube River
follow_up_question: What's a Khanate, and how is it different from other types of kingdoms?
